meaning: Communication where messages are sent and replied to at different times.
definition: Communication where messages are sent and replied to at different times.
example: Asynchronous communication allows us to work smoothly across time zones.

meaning: The time, energy, or mental capacity available to handle additional tasks.
definition: The energy or mental capacity required to deal with a situation.
example: I do not have the bandwidth to take on another project right now.

meaning: A recommended method or procedure that consistently produces the best results.
definition: Commercial or professional procedures that are accepted or prescribed as being correct or most effective.
example: Documenting your code is a best practice that helps the whole team.

meaning: To discuss a topic again at a later time.
definition: To discuss a topic again at a later time.
example: Let's circle back to the budget discussion during next week's meeting.

meaning: An in-depth, detailed analysis or discussion of a specific subject.
definition: An in-depth, detailed analysis or discussion of a specific subject.
example: We need to do a deep dive into the user data to find the bug.

meaning: Highly detailed or focusing on small, specific elements.
definition: Highly detailed or focusing on small, specific elements.
example: Let's look at the customer feedback at a more granular level.

meaning: Describing a general overview without entering into small details.
definition: Describing a general overview without entering into small details.
example: He gave a high-level summary of the new software platform.

meaning: To keep someone informed about a situation or project updates.
definition: To keep someone informed about a situation or project updates.
example: Please keep me in the loop regarding the client's decision.

meaning: To include someone in an ongoing discussion or email thread.
definition: To include someone in an ongoing discussion or email thread.
example: Please loop in the marketing director so she is aware of these changes.

meaning: Easy tasks that can be completed quickly to achieve fast results.
definition: Easy tasks that can be completed quickly to achieve fast results.
example: Updating the text on the homepage is low-hanging fruit for the team.

meaning: Being aware of something that will need attention in the future.
definition: Being aware of something that will need attention in the future.
example: Yes, the upcoming audit is on my radar; I am preparing files for it.

meaning: To delay a deadline, or to oppose a decision or request.
definition: To delay a deadline, or to oppose a decision or request.
example: The engineering team had to push back the delivery date by one week.

meaning: Happening immediately, with no delay in communication or processing.
definition: Happening immediately, with no delay in communication or processing.
example: We can collaborate in real time on this document using cloud software.

meaning: To isolate a team or information from the rest of the organization.
definition: A system, process, department, etc. that operates in isolation from others.
example: We should avoid working in silos; sharing information helps everyone.

meaning: To discuss a topic privately outside of a group meeting or channel.
definition: To discuss a topic privately outside of a group meeting or channel.
example: Let's take this technical discussion offline so we do not waste group time.
